item.title: INFRA: AI Model Pipeline
item.intent: The local AI model must download, load, and run inference reliably — a failed model download or slow inference kills the entire AI value proposition.
item.description: Per D-AI-5 and D-AI-9. Model download: separate from app (<50MB app, ~2-4GB model). Download via ODR or background asset download. Wi-Fi only by default, cellular opt-in. Non-blocking — editor usable during download. Progress indicator. Resume on interruption. Model loading: load into Core ML / MLX on app launch (for capable devices). Memory-mapped to minimize RAM impact. Model inference: token streaming pipeline. First token <500ms (D-PERF-4). Full response <3s. Model update: independent of app updates. Capability detection: check device (A16+/M1+), show/hide AI features accordingly (no broken affordances on unsupported devices).
acceptanceCriteria: Model downloads in background while user edits — no UI blocking
Download interrupted at 50% resumes from where it left off
Cellular download requires explicit user opt-in
Model loads and first inference completes with first token in <500ms on iPhone 15
Memory usage with model loaded stays under 100MB for editing session (D-PERF-5, model may be memory-mapped separately)
iPhone 14 shows no AI-related UI elements (buttons, ghost text, action bar items)
Device running low on storage shows clear message and option to skip/delete model
